name: Clearway Energy, Inc.
business: Clearway Energy, Inc. is a publicly-traded energy infrastructure investor with a focus on clean energy, owning a portfolio of approximately 12.9 GW of gross capacity including wind, solar, battery energy storage, and dispatchable combustion-based generation assets. The majority of its revenues are derived from long-term contractual arrangements for output or capacity, and it sells electricity and environmental attributes primarily to 38 local utilities and 26 commercial and industrial customers across 27 states.

exposures.sentence: The Company’s portfolio comprises approximately 12.9 GW of gross capacity in 27 states, including approximately 10.1 GW of wind, solar and battery energy storage systems, or BESS, and approximately 2.8 GW of dispatchable combustion-based power generation assets included in the Flexible Generation segment that provide critical grid reliability services.

The Company’s portfolio comprises approximately 12.9 GW of gross capacity in 27 states, including approximately 10.1 GW of wind, solar and battery energy storage systems, or BESS, and approximately 2.8 GW of dispatchable combustion-based power generation assets included in the Flexible Generation segment that provide critical grid reliability services.

The Company’s portfolio comprises approximately 12.9 GW of gross capacity in 27 states, including approximately 10.1 GW of wind, solar and battery energy storage systems, or BESS, and approximately 2.8 GW of dispatchable combustion-based power generation assets included in the Flexible Generation segment that provide critical grid reliability services.

On July 23, 2025, the Company entered into a development services agreement with Clearway Renew in connection with the repowering of the Goat Mountain wind facility. The Company estimates that its total capital investment in the Goat Mountain repowering will be $200 million, subject to closing adjustments.

catalysts.event: Deriva Solar Portfolio acquisition expected to close and fund
catalysts.sentence: The consummation of the transaction is subject to customary closing conditions and certain third-party approvals and is expected to occur in the first half of 2026.
Contingent upon achieving commercial operations in 2027, the 360 MW facility will sell power to an investment-grade counterparty under a new 15-year PPA.

catalysts.event: Mt. Storm repowering first phase mechanical completion
catalysts.sentence: Mechanical completion of the first phase of the repowering is expected to occur in the second half of 2026 with the second phase of the repowering expected to occur in the second half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Mt. Storm repowering second phase mechanical completion
catalysts.sentence: Mechanical completion of the first phase of the repowering is expected to occur in the second half of 2026 with the second phase of the repowering expected to occur in the second half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Spindle BESS and Rosamond South II BESS acquisition and substantial completion
catalysts.sentence: The consummation of the transaction is subject to customary closing conditions and certain third-party approvals and is expected in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: San Juan Mesa repowering commercial operations
catalysts.sentence: Contingent upon achieving commercial operations in 2027, the 135 MW facility will sell power to an investment-grade counterparty under a new 20-year PPA.
At substantial completion, which is expected to occur in the first half of 2026, the Company estimates it will pay an additional $62 million to Clearway Renew.

catalysts.event: Mt. Storm repowering Class B membership interests acquisition and Phase 1 commercial operations
catalysts.sentence: Upon achieving repowering commercial operations, which is expected to occur in the second half of 2026, the facility will sell power to Microsoft under a 20-year PPA.
Contingent upon achieving commercial operations in 2027, the 137 MW facility will sell power under its existing PPA with an investment-grade regulated entity for an additional two years through 2042.
